3159760.name: Project: Stellar
3159760.description:
Travel through space while vibing to the rhythm of fan-made remixes of Hololive songs!

The gameplay is a fusion of Project Sekai, Audio Surf, and Arcaea. The more notes you hit without failing, the better the combo, the higher the score! Once the fever meter is full, trigger it strategically strategically to score even more points. Do all this while flying along a track in 3d through space!

Featuring Normal, Hard, and Suicopath difficulties, this game can take you from enjoying the scenery and having a relaxing game session, to sweating buckets over a top score!

Each song in the soundtrack is produced entirely by Hololive fans, with varying styles of production, so you'll never get bored! From dubstep, to Dnb, to House, this game puts its own fan-made twist on the countless and ever-growing library of Hololive songs!
